summary: Testing iteration 2 - Verified key features: Web landing page renders correctly (blank screen bug fixed), Dashboard quick add modal has all 5 buttons (+1,+2,+3,+5,+10) and works correctly, /api/account/data-limits endpoint works with hidden_data field. Found issues: Eggs page modal missing quick add buttons and hen selector, Hens page bottom sheet missing +5 and +10 buttons.

ui_bugs.issue: Quick add buttons (+1,+2,+3,+5,+10) and hen selector are missing from the modal. Only shows date selector, +/- count buttons, and notes field.
Quick add section only shows +1,+2,+3 buttons. Missing +5 and +10 buttons. Also missing custom amount input field.

action_items: Fix Eggs page modal (eggs.tsx) - Quick add buttons and hen selector not rendering despite being in code
Fix Hens page bottom sheet (hens.tsx) - +5 and +10 buttons not visible, custom input field missing
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard quick add modal at index.tsx works correctly - all 5 buttons visible
Eggs page modal content appears to be truncated or not rendering fully on web
Hens bottom sheet quickEggButtons container may have layout constraint cutting off buttons

success_rate.frontend: 70% - Dashboard works, Eggs/Hens pages have rendering issues

seed_data_creation: Test eggs and hens created and cleaned up during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working. Dashboard quick add modal fully functional with all 5 buttons and hen selector. Eggs page and Hens page have UI rendering issues - the code includes quick add buttons but they're not visible in the rendered modal/bottom sheet. Web landing page at /api/web/ renders correctly.

web_landing_page.notes: Renders correctly at /api/web/ with hero image, title 'Hönsgården', and Google login button

eggs_page_quick_add.notes: Modal only shows date selector, count +/- buttons, and notes
